loc: Maluti-a-Phofung Local Municipality (near  Phuthaditjhaba), Thabo Mofutsanyana District Municipality, Free State
rmk:
The recording was not modified.

Species: Cnephaeus hottentotus (previously Eptesicus hottentotus)

Age: Adult

Sex: Male

Habitat: Riparian

Recording method: Hand-release

Individual captured in a mist net set across the entrance of a small cave during a bat survey. Individual flew into the cave when it began drizzling outside.

See https://www.inaturalist.org/observations/338210917 for pictures of the individual.
